APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 5/22/02, TO ALLAN A. SAMSON, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff and moving party.
Plaintiff's Motion to Set Aside Sanctions issued on 5/22/02, to Allan A. Samson, Esq., in the amount of $250.00, is scheduled this day. Court ordered Motion granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Joyce Long. (212)
